Ta program lore

The Behavioral Health Compliance Act (Ta program) is a government program to stop crime by changing criminal and disruptive men into women.

If the offender loses their virginity, the transformation is permanent.

Feel free to give bot ideas in the comments, this page is only for genderswap bots though.
